title: Uploader
description: The Uploader component provides a flexible interface for uploading files, supporting drag-and-drop, file lists, and dialog containers.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-uploader-drop-zone for drag-and-drop uploads.

sections.title: Drag & Drop Zone
sections.description: Shows the ax-uploader-drop-zone component with drag-and-drop functionality and visual feedback.

props.name: description
props.description: Description text for the drop zone.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

props.name: isCollapsed
props.description: Indicates whether the component is in a collapsed state.

methods.content:
/**
 * Closes the parent dialog or container.
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Toggles the collapsed state of the component.
 */
toggle(): void
